regional_cost_note: Drainage specialists in Queenstown typically charge $85–$160/m for French drains, $1,600–$4,200 for soakpits, and $5,500–$28,000+ for full site drainage. Queenstown commands premium pricing due to high demand and a tight local labour market. Poor site drainage is one of the most common causes of foundation problems — a drainage assessment is worthwhile before any significant earthworks.
